_note: Standalone single-mode manifest config. mcp-code-mode is a normal skill (no mode-registry.json); its references/ knowledge docs and assets/ templates are the routed leaves that the in-SKILL.md INTENT_SIGNALS + RESOURCE_MAP router selects. Consumed by generate-leaf-manifest.cjs to emit leaf-manifest.json. Regenerate leaf-manifest.json (and keep leaf-aliases.json in sync) whenever the references/ or assets/ corpus changes.
